title: Oriental Chicken Strips
excerpt: Ingredients 65 ml green curry paste 250 ml buttermilk 3 chicken breasts, cut into 2-cm thick strips salt and pepper to taste 375 ml Japanese breadcrumbs (Panko Crumbs) 65 ml finely chopped coriander leaves extra coriander leaves Method In a large glass bowl, mix together the green curry paste and buttermilk. Press the chicken strips slightly flatter with your palm …
html:
Ingredients

  • 65 ml green curry paste
  • 250 ml buttermilk
  • 3 chicken breasts, cut into 2-cm thick strips
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • 375 ml Japanese breadcrumbs (Panko Crumbs)
  • 65 ml finely chopped coriander leaves
  • extra coriander leaves

Method

In a large glass bowl, mix together the green curry paste and buttermilk.

Press the chicken strips slightly flatter with your palm and season with salt and pepper.

Put the chicken into the buttermilk mixture and cover the bowl with cling wrap.

Marinate for at least 30 minutes or longer in the fridge.

Mix together the crumbs and coriander leaves.

Place the mixture in a shallow soup bowl.

Lift the chicken strips out of the marinade and press each strip firmly into the crumbs on both sides.

Arrange the strips in a single layer on a greased baking tray and bake at 190°C for 8 – 10 minutes or until just cooked through and serve.

Makes 4 – 6 portions, serve with sweet chilli sauce and a fresh green salad.

Easy!
